title: 106 Project 1
description: My goal with this visualization was to investigate whether brands that market themselves as healthy are actually supported by stronger underlying nutrition profiles. As a consumer, I often notice terms like “natural,” “organic,” or “plant-based” on packaging, and I wanted to test whether these labels meaningfully reflect nutritional quality or function more as marketing tools.

title: Symbolism
description: This graph explores patterns in data that unintentionally resemble organic, blood-like forms, creating an unexpected visual tension between structure and interpretation. The resulting image invites viewers to consider how meaning can emerge from accidental patterns, even in purely quantitative outputs. Titled Symbolism, it highlights how data visualization can blur the boundary between scientific representation and artistic association.

title: DSC 80 Heatmap
description: This heatmap visualizes relationships between variables in the DSC 80 dataset, using color intensity to highlight patterns of similarity and difference across the data. By condensing complex interactions into a single visual structure, it makes underlying trends easier to identify at a glance. The result reveals clusters and gradients that would be difficult to detect in raw tabular form, emphasizing how visualization can simplify high-dimensional data.

title: 106 Checkpoint
description: This image captures an early attempt produced during the data exploration phase of the project, where different visualization approaches were tested to understand the structure and behavior of the dataset. It reflects an experimental stage in which design choices were still evolving and not yet finalized. The result highlights how initial explorations can reveal patterns and guide more refined, intentional visualizations later in the process.

title: Correlation Matrix
description: The correlation matrix supports the idea that 'social life' manifests differently across campuses depending on the platform. Instragram metrics form a tightly connected cluster, indicating that campuses with strong social precense, like high likes, comments, shares, and large follower bases, tend to excel consistently across all instagram engagement factors.

title: Cogs 108: UC Schools
description: As we can see above, UCSD, contrary to our hypothesis, ranks generally in the higher range compared to other UCs. Smaller campuses like UCM, UCR, UCSB, and UCSC show highly variable engagement due to smaller sizes, but UCSD's score is notably higher than six other UCs, two of which (UCB, UCD) have larger student body sizes.

title: Temporal Pattern Drift
description: This visualization examines how patterns in the dataset evolve over time, revealing gradual shifts in distribution and intensity. Rather than focusing on static snapshots, it emphasizes motion within the data and how relationships change across intervals. The result highlights subtle temporal drift that would be difficult to detect without aggregation.

title: Network Connectivity Map
description: This graph represents relationships between entities as a network structure, where nodes and edges reveal clusters of interaction. The visualization emphasizes central hubs and isolated components, helping identify key points of influence within the system. It demonstrates how network structure can reveal hierarchy and dependency.

title: Geospatial Density Overlay
description: This map-based visualization overlays density information onto geographic space, highlighting areas of concentrated activity. By translating raw coordinates into spatial intensity, it reveals regional clustering patterns that are not immediately visible in tabular data. The visualization emphasizes how location-based analysis can uncover environmental or behavioral trends.

title: Distribution Skew Analysis
description: This chart explores asymmetry in data distributions, focusing on how values deviate from expected symmetry. It highlights skewness and outliers, helping to identify whether the dataset is balanced or influenced by extreme values. The visualization supports deeper interpretation of central tendency measures.

title: Multilingual Sentiment Comparison
description: Esta visualización compara el sentimiento expresado en diferentes idiomas dentro del mismo conjunto de datos, mostrando cómo el lenguaje puede influir en la interpretación emocional. Elle met en évidence des variations subtiles entre les catégories linguistiques et révèle des tendances culturelles dans les données. The combined view demonstrates how multilingual analysis can surface hidden bias in textual datasets.

title: Feature Importance Ranking
description: This visualization ranks variables by their contribution to predictive performance within a model. It highlights which features carry the most weight and which have minimal impact, supporting model interpretability. The result helps clarify how decisions are being driven by underlying data attributes.
